name: Drew Sample
headline: Sample's blocking floor isn't a fantasy ceiling
body:
Our numbers paint Sample as exactly what he is: a complementary piece whose receiving usage barely registers. He ran 286 routes across 12 games in 2025 yet drew only 20 targets, a 3.3% share that translated to 0.37 yards per route run and a 68th-ranked finish at the position. Fifteen grabs, 106 yards and a single score netted just 16.9 fantasy points. The efficiency markers stay quietly respectable, a 0.133 EPA per play and 40% success rate with zero drops, but volume this thin caps any standalone value.

The trend isn't encouraging either. His 2024 line carried sharper marks, 0.217 EPA and a 59.1% success rate, and his 28.3-point 2023 still towers over recent output. With Cincinnati's targets funneling elsewhere, Sample profiles as a blocking-first tight end and deep-bench afterthought, draftable only if injuries hand him a genuine route-tree role.
